summary_en: All treasury shares held by the company at the reference time (immediately before JX Metals acquires 100% via stock exchange on 2026-06-01) to be cancelled. Treasury share count as of 2026-03-31: 84,813 shares. Cancellation effective 2026-06-01.
title_en: Notice of Cancellation of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: On 2026-05-14, Toho Titanium Company's board of directors resolved to cancel all treasury shares held by the company at the reference time (defined as immediately before JX Metals acquires 100% ownership via stock exchange). Under the stock exchange agreement signed on 2026-02-25, JX Metals will acquire all issued shares of Toho Titanium effective 2026-06-01, becoming its wholly-owned subsidiary. Per the terms of the stock exchange contract, Toho Titanium is required to cancel all treasury shares at the reference time, including any shares acquired through statutory appraisal rights buyback provisions. As of 2026-03-31, the company held 84,813 treasury shares (0.12% of 71,270,910 total issued shares). The cancellation is effective 2026-06-01.
